2606.08875.title: Can the Environment Speak for Itself? $T^{2}$-GRPO: A Turn-Trajectory Group Relative Policy Optimization for Caregiver Agents
2606.08875.paper_summary: Optimizing large language models (LLMs) for long-horizon caregiver agents requires balancing delayed task objectives with immediate environment dynamics, such as patient distress and resistance. In dementia care, this balance is especially difficult: trajectory level rewards are too sparse for turn level credit assignment, while external LLM-based evaluators are costly and can misread fragmented or indirect patient responses. To address this issue, we propose \textbf{T}urn-\textbf{T}rajectory \textbf{G}roup \textbf{R}elative \textbf{P}olicy \textbf{O}ptimization (\textbf{T$^{2}$-GRPO}), a framework that decouples caregiver RL into two normalized reward horizons and enforces safety through a binary hard veto. $T^2$-GRPO derives dense turn-level rewards directly from environment state transitions, measuring changes in patient distress and resistance from a frozen dementia patient simulator. These environment-grounded rewards are combined with trajectory-level evaluations through independent centered-rank normalization, which preserves heterogeneous reward signals and mitigates reward collapse. Extensive experiments on dementia caregivers show that T $^{2}$-GRPO outperforms competitive baselines, indicating a substantial improvement for emotionally sensitive caregiver scenarios that effectively handles immediate patient feedback, long-term care outcomes, and safety constraints.
2606.08875.paper_summary_zh: 優化大型語言模型（LLMs）以適應長期護理代理人需要在延遲的任務目標與即時的環境動態之間取得平衡，例如患者的痛苦和抵抗。在癡呆症護理中，這種平衡尤其困難：軌跡級別的獎勵對於回合級別的信用分配來說過於稀疏，而基於LLM的外部評估者成本高昂，且可能誤解片段化或間接的患者反應。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了\textbf{T}urn-\textbf{T}rajectory \textbf{G}roup \textbf{R}elative \textbf{P}olicy \textbf{O}ptimization（\textbf{T$^{2}$-GRPO}），這是一個將護理者強化學習解耦為兩個標準化獎勵視野的框架，並通過二元硬性否決來強化安全性。$T^2$-GRPO直接從環境狀態轉換中推導出密集的回合級別獎勵，測量來自一個凍結的癡呆患者模擬器的患者痛苦和抵抗的變化。這些基於環境的獎勵與通過獨立的中心排名標準化的軌跡級別評估相結合，從而保留異質獎勵信號並減輕獎勵崩潰。在癡呆症護理者的廣泛實驗中，T $^{2}$-GRPO表現超過了競爭基準，顯示出在情感敏感的護理場景中有顯著的改進，能有效處理即時的患者反饋、長期護理結果和安全約束。
2606.08875.author: Yutong Song et.al.
2606.08875.authors: Yutong Song, Jiang Wu, Pengfei Zhang, Wenjun Huang, Honghui Xu, Nikil Dutt, Amir M. Rahmani
